infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 22 - 24 May 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 18:15, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team Document 92 Date 24 May 2026 Time 17:55 No / Driver 63 -

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX
22 - 24 May 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 18:15, in relation to the
incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team
Document 92
Date 24 May 2026
Time 17:55
No / Driver 63 - George Russell
Reason Alleged breach of Article 12.2.1.h of the International Sporting Code and/or Article
B1.5.4b of the FIA F1 Regulations.
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Marcel Demers
